Get player season stats

Source: R/player_game_ratings.R
player_season_stats.Rd

Aggregates per-game box-score stats from load_player_stats() into season totals or per-80-minute averages. Useful for seeing stat leaders.

Usage

player_season_stats(
  season_val = get_afl_season(),
  per80 = FALSE,
  sort_by = "disposals"
)

Arguments

season_val

Season year(s). Default is current season.

per80

Logical. If TRUE, return per-80-minute averages. Default FALSE (season totals).

sort_by

Column name to sort by (descending). Default "disposals".

Value

A data.table with season-aggregated stats.

On this page
